scripts.uglify: uglifyjs assets/js/vendor/jquery/jquery-3.5.1.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.fitvids.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.greedy-navigation.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.magnific-popup.js assets/js/plugins/jquery.ba-throttle-debounce.js assets/js/plugins/smooth-scroll.js assets/js/plugins/gumshoe.js assets/js/_main.js -c -m -o assets/js/main.min.js
scripts.uglify:gui-agent: uglifyjs assets/js/gui-agent/config.js assets/js/gui-agent/utils/logger.js assets/js/gui-agent/utils/storage.js assets/js/gui-agent/core/EventEmitter.js assets/js/gui-agent/core/ElementMapper.js assets/js/gui-agent/core/DOMParser.js assets/js/gui-agent/cursor/CursorAnimator.js assets/js/gui-agent/cursor/BigCursor.js assets/js/gui-agent/ai/CommandParser.js assets/js/gui-agent/ai/ActionExecutor.js assets/js/gui-agent/ui/ControlPanel.js assets/js/gui-agent/main.js -c -m -o assets/js/gui-agent.min.js
scripts.build:js: npm run uglify && npm run add-banner
scripts.build:all: npm run build:js && npm run build:gui-agent
